Guidelines

Here are some important social dynamics about InheritX

Privacy Policy

Data Collection and Usage

PERSONAL INFORMATION

We Collect:

  • ›Legal Name and Contact Information
  • ›Government-Issued Identification
  • ›Biometric Data (if applicable)
  • ›Authentication Credentials
  • ›Communication Preferences

TECHNICAL DATA

We Record:

  • ›Device Information
  • ›IP Address
  • ›Browser and OS Details
  • ›Network Information
  • ›Cookies and Tracking Data

Usage Data

    We monitor:

  • ›Platform Interactions/Patterns
  • ›Security Event Logs
  • ›Feature Usage Metrics

Data Protection

SECURITY MEASURES

  • ›End-To-End Encryption For All Sensitive Data
  • ›Regular Security Audits And Penetration Testing
  • ›Zero-Knowledge Proof Implementation
  • ›Secure Key Management Systems
  • ›Regular Backup And Recovery Testing

STORAGE AND RETENTION

  • ›Encrypted Storage On Distributed System
  • ›Regular Data Minimization Reviews
  • ›Compliance With Retention Regulations
  • ›Secure Data Destruction Protocols
  • ›Backup Maintenance Procedures

Third-Party Sharing

SERVICE PROVIDERS

Limited Sharing With:

  • ›Identity Verification Services
  • ›Security Audit Firms
  • ›Legal Compliance Partners
  • ›Technical Infrastructure Providers
  • ›Customer Support Systems

LEGAL REQUIREMENTS

Data Shared For:

  • ›Regulatory Compliance
  • ›Legal Proceedings
  • ›Law Enforcement Requests
  • ›Court Orders
  • ›Fraud Prevention

User Rights and Controls

ACCESS RIGHTS

  • ›Request Data Copies
  • ›Correct Personal Information
  • ›Delete Account Data
  • ›Export Transaction History
  • ›Review Security Logs

PRIVACY CONTROLS

  • ›Visibility Settings
  • ›Communication Preferences
  • ›Data Sharing Options
  • ›Authentication Methods
  • ›Activity Notifications

Code of Ethics

Terms and Conditions

Contact Us
